title: 日本ダービーの後に・矛盾する気持ち

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon lives up to her fans'
expectations and finishes the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she finishes in first place, her dream of
winning the Triple Crown is over. Despite that,
Mihono Bourbon feels the strong urge to run in
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower seems not to care about winning or
losing—she just wants to "catch up." Mihono
Bourbon is very confused by this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I reassure her that she'll understand someday. In
the meantime, we establish the final Classic Triple
Crown race, the Kikuka Sho, as her next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though her dream of winning the Triple Crown is
already over, Mihono Bourbon feels the
inexplicable urge to stay the course and run the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower seems not to care about winning or
losing—she just wants to "catch up." Mihono
Bourbon is very confused by this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I reassure her that she'll understand someday. In
the meantime, we establish the final Classic Triple
Crown race, the Kikuka Sho, as her next goal.
